title: lipochaeta connata var. acris
intro: Lipochaeta connata var. acris, also known as the Hawaiian lipochaeta or island lipochaeta, is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family, native to Hawaii. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, possessing medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lipochaeta connata var. acris include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and topical applications, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for various health benefits.
